message.content:
## 스펙 컴플라이언스 리뷰 — Task 6: Import 관리 페이지 UI 작업 디렉토리: `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2` 방금 구현된 Import UI 파일들이 아래 스펙을 모두 충족하는지 검토하라. **코드 품질은 이 리뷰의 범위가 아니다** — 스펙 준수 여부만 판단한다. ## 검토 대상 파일 아래 파일들을 모두 읽어라: 1. `features/import/types.ts` 2. `features/import/components/ImportUploadForm.tsx` 3. `features/import/components/ImportJobTable.tsx` 4. `app/(admin)/import/page.tsx` ## 스펙 체크리스트 ### types.ts - [ ] `ImportJobItem` 타입이 정의되어 있음 - [ ] 필드: `id`, `fileName`, `status('PENDING'|'RUNNING'|'DONE'|'FAILED')`, `totalCount`, `doneCount`, `errorMsg(string|null)`, `createdAt(Date)`, `completedAt(Date|null)` ### ImportUploadForm.tsx - [ ] `'use client'` 선언 - [ ] `accept=".csv,.xlsx"` 파일 타입 제한 - [ ] 파일 미선택 시 버튼 disabled - [ ] `POST /api/import/jobs` fetch 호출 (FormData) - [ ] 업로드 중 로딩 상태 표시 - [ ] 성공: `toast.success` 호출 + `router.refresh()` - [ ] 실패: `toast.error` 호출 - [ ] try/catch 구조 ### ImportJobTable.tsx - [ ] `'use client'` 선언 - [ ] `DataTable` 컴포넌트 사용 (`@/components/ui/data-table`) - [ ] `ImportJobItem[]` props 받음 - [ ] 5개 컬럼: id, fileName, status, 처리현황(doneCount/totalCount), createdAt - [ ] status 컬럼: Badge 컴포넌트로 4가지 상태 표시 (DONE/FAILED/RUNNING/PENDING 각각 다른 variant) - [ ] createdAt: `format()` 사용하여 날짜 포맷 ### app/(admin)/import/page.tsx - [ ] Server Component (async function) - [ ] `getImportJobs` 호출 - [ ] `PageHeader` 컴포넌트 사용 - [ ] `ImportUploadForm` 렌더링 - [ ] `ImportJobTable` 렌더링 - [ ] 플레이스홀더 `
JSON.stringify
` 제거됨 ## 출력 형식 스펙 위반 항목만 나열하라. 모두 충족하면 "✅ 스펙 컴플라이언트" 한 줄만 출력하라. 형식: ``` ❌ [파일명] 항목명: 구체적 문제점 ``` 또는 ``` ✅ 스펙 컴플라이언트 ```

- understand-anything:understand
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init
- review
- security-review

1 'use client' 2 3 import { useRef, useState } from 'react' 4 import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation' 5 import { toast } from 'sonner' 6 import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' 7 8 export function ImportUploadForm() { 9 const router = useRouter() 10 const fileInputRef = useRef(null) 11 const [selectedFile, setSelectedFile] = useState(null) 12 const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false) 13 14 const handleFileChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent) => { 15 const file = e.target.files?.[0] ?? null 16 setSelectedFile(file) 17 } 18 19 const handleUpload = async () => { 20 if (!selectedFile) return 21 22 setLoading(true) 23 try { 24 const formData = new FormData() 25 formData.append('file', selectedFile) 26 27 const res = await fetch('/api/import/jobs', { 28 method: 'POST', 29 body: formData, 30 }) 31 32 if (!res.ok) { 33 const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({})) 34 throw new Error((data as { error?: string }).error ?? '업로드에 실패했습니다') 35 } 36 37 toast.success('Import가 시작되었습니다') 38 setSelectedFile(null) 39 if (fileInputRef.current) fileInputRef.current.value = '' 40 router.refresh() 41 } catch (err) { 42 console.error('[ImportUploadForm] upload error:', err) 43 toast.error(err instanceof Error ? err.message : '업로드 중 오류가 발생했습니다') 44 } finally { 45 setLoading(false) 46 } 47 } 48 49 return ( 50

1	'use client'
2	
3	import { format } from 'date-fns'
4	import type { ColDef, ValueFormatterParams } from 'ag-grid-community'
5	import { DataTable } from '@/components/ui/data-table'
6	import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'
7	import type { ImportJobItem } from '@/features/import/types'
8	
9	interface ImportJobTableProps {
10	    items: ImportJobItem[]
11	}
12	
13	type StatusVariant = 'default' | 'destructive' | 'secondary' | 'outline'
14	
15	const STATUS_MAP: Record<ImportJobItem['status'], { label: string; variant: StatusVariant }> = {
16	    DONE: { label: '완료', variant: 'default' },
17	    FAILED: { label: '실패', variant: 'destructive' },
18	    RUNNING: { label: '진행중', variant: 'secondary' },
19	    PENDING: { label: '대기', variant: 'outline' },
20	}
21	
22	function StatusBadge({ value }: { value: ImportJobItem['status'] }) {
23	    const { label, variant } = STATUS_MAP[value] ?? { label: value, variant: 'outline' }
24	    return <Badge variant={variant}>{label}</Badge>
25	}
26	
27	const columnDefs: ColDef<ImportJobItem>[] = [
28	    { field: 'id', headerName: '번호', width: 80 },
29	    { field: 'fileName', headerName: '파일명', flex: 1 },
30	    {
31	        field: 'status',
32	        headerName: '상태',
33	        width: 100,
34	        cellRenderer: (params: { value: ImportJobItem['status'] }) => (
35	            <StatusBadge value={params.value} />
36	        ),
37	    },
38	    {
39	        headerName: '처리 현황',
40	        width: 120,
41	        valueGetter: (params) => {
42	            const data = params.data
43	            if (!data) return ''
44	            return `${data.doneCount} / ${data.totalCount}`
45	        },
46	    },
47	    {
48	        field: 'createdAt',
49	        headerName: '요청일시',
50	        width: 150,
51	        valueFormatter: (params: ValueFormatterParams<ImportJobItem, Date>) =>
52	            params.value ? format(new Date(params.value), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm') : '',
53	    },
54	]
55	
56	export function ImportJobTable({ items }: ImportJobTableProps) {
57	    return (
58	        <DataTable<ImportJobItem>
59	            columnDefs={columnDefs}
60	            rowData={items}
61	        />
62	    )
63	}
64

content.text:
모든 파일을 확인했습니다. 체크리스트 항목별로 검토합니다. --- **types.ts** — 모든 필드(`id`, `fileName`, `status`, `totalCount`, `doneCount`, `errorMsg`, `createdAt`, `completedAt`) 스펙과 일치. ✅ **ImportUploadForm.tsx** — `'use client'`, `accept=".csv,.xlsx"`, disabled 조건(`!selectedFile || loading`), `POST /api/import/jobs` fetch, 로딩 상태(`loading`), `toast.success` + `router.refresh()`, `toast.error`, try/catch 모두 존재. ✅ **ImportJobTable.tsx** — `'use client'`, `DataTable` 사용, `ImportJobItem[]` props, 5개 컬럼(id/fileName/status/처리현황/createdAt), 4가지 상태 Badge, `format()` 날짜 포맷. ✅ **page.tsx** — async function(Server Component), `getImportJobs` 호출, `PageHeader` 사용, `ImportUploadForm` 렌더링, `ImportJobTable` 렌더링, 플레이스홀더 `
JSON.stringify
` 없음. ✅ --- ✅ 스펙 컴플라이언트
